caption:
Your ad account says one number.

Your CRM says another.

Your spreadsheet says a third.

Most owners can't agree on which lead source closed last month's revenue. Everyone has a number. Nobody has the same one.

The Black Arrow platform closes that gap. Every lead, text, booking, and dollar lives in one system, so the reporting page shows exactly which source and which follow-up closed each deal.

Test it on your own numbers. 14 days free, no card required.

DM "TRIAL" to start your free trial.

#ServiceBusiness #CRM #SmallBusinessMarketing #LeadGeneration #RevenueGrowth
rationale: Cut the referral tangent to keep one clean idea: revenue attribution. Keyword now appears exactly once, in the caption CTA, while the video end card teases the payoff without repeating it. Tightened language removes filler adverbs and aligns the video's spreadsheet line with the caption for consistency.
